_note: Synthetic view of the STS credentials embedded in the SnapStart snapshot. Decoded from the provider's internal cache state.
observationOnRestore: Every container restored from snapshot ss-4a82c1d97f inherits an expiry of 2026-04-16T20:02:31Z. After that wall-clock moment, each restore has already-expired credentials. Warm containers that have already refreshed are fine; cold starts are not.
